title.rendered: How We Teamed Up with Toxi Taxi to Bring Jupiter’s Favorite Ride to Life on Social

content.rendered:
How It Started

Toxi Taxi is more than just a way to get around town — they’re a Jupiter staple.
They serve the local crowd, from Abacoa to Alton, offering safe rides, parking relief, and a fun vibe every night of the week.

When they reached out to Local Social, the goal wasn’t to launch a full-blown campaign — it was to create something fun, fast, and local.
We were more than happy to help.

Project Overview

We partnered with the Toxi Taxi team to bring their brand to life with two short-form reels that matched their laid-back, community-first feel.

They wanted to keep it light, local, and authentic. So we:

– Shot and edited two vertical videos
– Added music, captions, and a location-friendly hook
– Highlighted the ride zone, the vibe, and the value (including the hangover cure reel featuring RevitalIV)
– Delivered full caption copy and support to get it live and engaging fast

We also designed and installed a custom banner for their cart, adding a layer of physical visibility that fit right into the downtown Abacoa scene.

Collaboration Highlights

– Summer Nights Reel: Aerial downtown vibe with scooters, kids, and nightlife
– Bar Recovery Skit: A fun scene with post-party chaos and IV therapy on the go
– Real community engagement: DMs, comments, shares, and local buzz
– Five-star feedback from the client within the week

Client quote:
“Working with Local Social has been an absolute game changer!”

Key Wins

Helped introduce Toxi Taxi to a wider audience in a style that felt real
Generated over 260 total likes and 65+ comments between both reels
Created evergreen video assets they can use for months to come
Strengthened their community connection with authentic storytelling

Final CTA

This wasn’t a big-budget production — it was a local collaboration rooted in community.
We’re grateful to work with brands like Toxi Taxi that keep our town moving and our content real.

Want help capturing the heart of your local business?
Let’s talk.

excerpt.rendered: Toxi Taxi is part of the local fabric in Jupiter, and we were glad to help bring their vibe to life. We teamed up to create two fun, low-pressure reels that reflect who they are and what they do best. No overthinking, just real content for a business we genuinely love working with.
